chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 14 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Khadim Hussain Leghari, advocate for petitioner Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. along with SIP Shafi Muhammad PS Naukot district Mirpurkhas Learned Asstt: A.G. files comments of respondent No.3 which are taken on record. Learned counsel for petitioner submits t The petitioner is not present today; however, I have noted from the prayer clause of the petition and order dated 2.1.2018 whereby that the petitioners have sought legal protection. Learned A.A.G. is present and states that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide the same protection to the petitioners as is available to other citizen of country. In view of statement of learned A.A.G. the present petition is disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
